text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over, along with all our
scheduled plans.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer. My body feels a little
better now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the special care Manhattan Cafe
received over the summer, her symptoms are
looking a little better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hello there. Make any progress with Cafe this
summer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her what I learned about Manhattan Cafe's
friend.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. So she can often be helpful, but
sometimes exhibit bizarre behavior.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Meaning... No, wait. If we think in terms of
external pressure, or perhaps an impulse for
self-harm, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon gets lost in a sea of thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come what may, fall awaits. We endured through
the spring, knowing we had fall to work toward.
